steps.title: Use the formation date
steps.content: The student wants to specify when Ur formed. The relevant note states that Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago, while the other notes define supercontinents or discuss Gondwana.

steps.title: Choose the direct date
steps.content: Choice A is general and gives no date. Choice C defines Ur as a supercontinent but does not say when it formed. Choice D explains the supercontinent cycle generally. The sentence with Ur's formation date directly answers the goal. The answer is B.
